mapper.insert: INSERT INTO floor_plan (title, description, status, content_json, is_deleted, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{status}, #{contentJson}, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE floor_plan SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, content_json = #{contentJson}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE floor_plan SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, description, status, content_json, is_deleted, create_time, update_time FROM floor_plan WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM floor_plan
is_deleted = 0
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
